summary: Excellent test suite that systematically covers all task requirements across seven clearly delineated TDD cycles. All major requirements are exercised: queue FIFO semantics (including throw-on-empty), exponential backoff formula with capping, configurable MaxRetries, retry exhaustion, dead-letter queue population, progress callback contract with cumulative counters, and a rich final summary object. The integration test in Cycle 7 ties every component together with a realistic mixed-outcome workload. Design is exemplary: closures use .GetNewClosure() with an explanatory comment, mutable shared state in scriptblocks correctly uses Hashtable/ArrayList instead of fragile array reassignment, SleepAction is always injected to avoid real delays, and each test creates its own fresh queue for full independence. Minor rigor gaps prevent a perfect score: peek-on-empty throwing is not tested (only dequeue-on-empty is), no boundary tests for BaseDelayMs or MaxDelayMs of 0, and there is no assertion that SleepAction receives correct delays within the full Invoke-Pipeline call path (only within Invoke-WithRetry directly). The Retried counter semantics are covered but only in a single scenario. These gaps are small relative to the overall thoroughness.
